page_metadata.biotools__summary:
A consensus approach to infer accurate copy numbers from low coverage data.

The majority of copy number callers requires high read coverage data that is often achieved with elevated material input, which increases the heterogeneity of tissue samples.

The majority of copy number callers requires high read coverage data that is often achieved with elevated material input, which increases the heterogeneity of tissue samples.
